notableEvents.label: Donovan Walton pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Donovan Walton singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Bryan Abreu. Nick Madrigal to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Joey Loperfido. Nick Madrigal scores. Donovan Walton to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Joey Loperfido pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Loperfido flies out to left fielder Wade Meckler.
